lang.title: Choose your language
hero.bio:
I'm a designer specialized in UX and service design. I believe in the power of design and art to create experiences that don't just work, but resonate.

Curious by nature, passionate about sports and travel, I enjoy experimenting with AI tools as creative companions in my workflow and drawing inspiration from methods and frameworks across other disciplines to nurture and grow my creative thinking.

projects.title: Projects
projects.ublo.desc: France-based platform helping property managers run their portfolios efficiently.
projects.bellpi.desc: E-commerce platform aimed at transforming the buying and selling experience of used vehicles.
projects.bnf.desc: Web application designed to create a digital twin showcasing the architectural heritage and collections of the BnF Richelieu site.
projects.jumbomana.desc: AI assistant guiding travelers through their search for information at Lyon–Saint-Exupéry international airport.
projects.andy.desc: Branding, website and experience improvements for an electrical services company in the United States.
projects.paramo.desc: Experimental project focused on creating an immersive experience inspired by natural ecosystems.
